summary: Iteration 32: Tested refactoring of PageBuilder.js/PagesManager.js into smaller components and backend server.py modularization. All refactored components working correctly - no functional regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Clean refactoring - seed_data function extracted to seed.py (407 lines), server.py now 52 lines with proper imports
PageBuilder.js: Properly imports SortableBlock from extracted component, BLOCK_ICONS exported correctly
SortableBlock.js: Clean extraction with proper exports (SortableBlock function and BLOCK_ICONS constant)
LayoutPreview.js: Exports getLayoutLabel, LayoutPreview, LAYOUT_ICONS, LEGACY_LAYOUT_META - all used correctly in PagesManager
PageEditorDialog.js: Properly imports PageBuilder, LAYOUTS, LEGACY_LAYOUTS, LayoutPreview components
PagesManager.js: Clean import of PageEditorDialog and getLayoutLabel from extracted components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring task completed successfully. All extracted components (SortableBlock.js, LayoutPreview.js, PageEditorDialog.js, seed.py) are properly integrated. Previous features (service HTML rendering, Read More links, hero video) still working.
